mano_cua.result_summary: Script Lab编辑器编译失败，与623相同的TS2322错误（provideCompletionItems函数类型签名不匹配），Failed to compile，CSS IntelliSense自动补全功能无法测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The error persists even after a hard refresh. This is definitively a build-time compilation error that prevents the Script Lab editor from loading at all. 应用程序显示 "Failed to compile" 错误，错误文件: utilities.ts（第39行），错误类型: TypeScript TS2322。与script-lab-623为同一commit(a35196f7e2)同一编译错误。
